---
title: "Labour Market Data"
format: html
---

## Labour Market Trends Explorer

This interactive tool visualises labour force participation, employment, and unemployment indicators using TÜİK data.

::: {=html}
<div class="lab-controls">
  <div class="lab-control">
    <label for="indicatorSelect"><strong>Indicator</strong></label>
    <select id="indicatorSelect">
      <option value="lfpr">Labour Force Participation Rate</option>
      <option value="employment">Employment Rate</option>
      <option value="unemployment">Unemployment Rate</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <div class="lab-control">
    <label for="startYear"><strong>Start Year</strong></label>
    <select id="startYear"></select>
  </div>

  <div class="lab-control">
    <label for="endYear"><strong>End Year</strong></label>
    <select id="endYear"></select>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="lab-summary" id="labSummary"></div>

<div id="labourChart" style="width:100%;height:520px;"></div>
:::

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>
<script>
async function loadCSV(path) {
  const response = await fetch(path);
  if (!response.ok) throw new Error("CSV file could not be loaded.");
  const text = await response.text();

  const lines = text.trim().split("\n");
  const headers = lines[0].split(",");

  return lines.slice(1).map(line => {
    const values = line.split(",");
    const obj = {};
    headers.forEach((h, i) => obj[h.trim()] = values[i].trim());
    obj.year = +obj.year;
    obj.total = +obj.total;
    obj.male = +obj.male;
    obj.female = +obj.female;
    return obj;
  });
}

function indicatorLabel(code) {
  const labels = {
    lfpr: "Labour Force Participation Rate",
    employment: "Employment Rate",
    unemployment: "Unemployment Rate"
  };
  return labels[code] || code;
}

function populateYearSelect(selectEl, years, selectedValue) {
  selectEl.innerHTML = "";
  years.forEach(year => {
    const option = document.createElement("option");
    option.value = year;
    option.textContent = year;
    if (year === selectedValue) option.selected = true;
    selectEl.appendChild(option);
  });
}

function updateSummary(data, indicator, endYear) {
  const row = data.find(d => d.year === endYear && d.indicator === indicator);
  const summary = document.getElementById("labSummary");

  if (!row) {
    summary.innerHTML = "";
    return;
  }

  summary.innerHTML = `
    <div class="summary-card">
      <div class="summary-title">Selected Indicator</div>
      <div class="summary-value">${indicatorLabel(indicator)}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="summary-card">
      <div class="summary-title">Year</div>
      <div class="summary-value">${row.year}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="summary-card">
      <div class="summary-title">Total</div>
      <div class="summary-value">${row.total}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="summary-card">
      <div class="summary-title">Male</div>
      <div class="summary-value">${row.male}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="summary-card">
      <div class="summary-title">Female</div>
      <div class="summary-value">${row.female}</div>
    </div>
  `;
}

function drawChart(data, indicator, startYear, endYear) {
  const filtered = data
    .filter(d => d.indicator === indicator && d.year >= startYear && d.year <= endYear)
    .sort((a, b) => a.year - b.year);

  const years = filtered.map(d => d.year);

  const traces = [
    {
      x: years,
      y: filtered.map(d => d.total),
      mode: "lines+markers",
      name: "Total"
    },
    {
      x: years,
      y: filtered.map(d => d.male),
      mode: "lines+markers",
      name: "Male"
    },
    {
      x: years,
      y: filtered.map(d => d.female),
      mode: "lines+markers",
      name: "Female"
    }
  ];

  const layout = {
    title: indicatorLabel(indicator),
    xaxis: { title: "Year" },
    yaxis: { title: "Rate (%)" },
    margin: { t: 60, r: 20, b: 60, l: 60 },
    hovermode: "x unified"
  };

  Plotly.newPlot("labourChart", traces, layout, { responsive: true });
}

async function initLabourMarketTool() {
  const data = await loadCSV("labour_market.csv");

  const allYears = [...new Set(data.map(d => d.year))].sort((a, b) => a - b);

  const indicatorSelect = document.getElementById("indicatorSelect");
  const startYearSelect = document.getElementById("startYear");
  const endYearSelect = document.getElementById("endYear");

  populateYearSelect(startYearSelect, allYears, allYears[0]);
  populateYearSelect(endYearSelect, allYears, allYears[allYears.length - 1]);

  function refresh() {
    const indicator = indicatorSelect.value;
    const startYear = +startYearSelect.value;
    const endYear = +endYearSelect.value;

    if (startYear > endYear) return;

    drawChart(data, indicator, startYear, endYear);
    updateSummary(data, indicator, endYear);
  }

  indicatorSelect.addEventListener("change", refresh);
  startYearSelect.addEventListener("change", refresh);
  endYearSelect.addEventListener("change", refresh);

  refresh();
}

initLabourMarketTool().catch(err => {
  document.getElementById("labourChart").innerHTML =
    `<p style="color:#b91c1c;">Error: ${err.message}</p>`;
});
</script>
